_meta.description: Curated slug -> category display-name overrides, consulted by scripts/graph/derive-graph.js ONLY when a registry component carries no category (e.g. its Figma frames sit directly on a category-header page, which the sync cannot attribute). The registry always wins when it carries a category, so each entry self-retires once the Figma pages are reorganized and a re-sync restores the category. Delete entries as they retire.
_meta.remove_when: Figma member pages created under 'Form (input & selection)' and components' frames moved onto them; next sync then restores registry categories
